_comment: GEN-01 — Style bible por Kaeli p/ o subcomando `gen` (txt2img nativo). O `gen` acha o perfil pelo slug (--kaeli) e monta o prompt como: _base.positive_prefix + <Kaeli>.positive + (--prompt extra) + _frames.<tipo>.framing + _base.style. O negativo é _base.negative + <Kaeli>.negative_extra. Flags da CLI SEMPRE vencem o perfil; o perfil vence o _base; o _base vence o default do código. Adicionar/ajustar Kaeli = só editar este JSON (nada de prompt solto espalhado). Os valores são PONTOS DE PARTIDA — trave um seed bom depois (ver .recipe.json de cada geração). enquadramento por tipo resolve a dor-raiz: a thumb 1:1 NÃO corta os seios (framing explícito + negativo anti-crop).

_base.positive_prefix: masterpiece, best quality, amazing quality, very aesthetic, absurdres, highly detailed
_base.style: gacha game splash art, game cg, official key visual, premium mobile game art, ultra-detailed, intricate details, glossy reflective eyes, detailed iris, glossy render, lustrous skin, subsurface scattering, soft cinematic shading, volumetric lighting, rim light, vibrant rich colors, dramatic high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, sharp focus, 8k
_base.negative: lowres, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, blurry, bad anatomy, bad hands, bad proportions, missing fingers, extra digits, fewer digits, extra arms, extra legs, deformed, mutated, malformed limbs, disfigured, watermark, signature, text, username, artist name, error, cropped, out of frame, head out of frame, cropped breasts, cropped chest, cut off chest, monochrome, greyscale, sketch, loli, child, toddler, baby face, childish, young girl, chibi

thumb.framing: cowboy shot, upper body, chest and bust fully in frame, breasts not cropped, looking at viewer, slight head tilt, dynamic angle

idle.framing: full body, standing, full figure in frame, feet visible, dynamic pose, transparent-friendly plain background

wallpaper.framing: wide cinematic composition, three-quarter body, epic scenery background, depth of field

portrait.framing: vertical composition, three-quarter body, atmospheric background

banner.framing: wide banner composition, character to one side, sweeping epic scenery, cinematic

velvet.note: Onda B — vampire princess gótica roxa; foco em olho vítreo/sedutor, cabelo c/ joias, renda densa, coroa gótica (alvo: traço gacha igual/melhor que GPT)
velvet.positive: 1girl, solo, mature female, beautiful adult woman, very long flowing black hair with purple highlights, fine glossy hair strands, intricate hair jewelry chains, beautiful detailed glowing red eyes, gradient red iris, narrow lidded sultry eyes, sharp eyelashes, aegyo-sal, elegant makeup, red lips, seductive expression, pale flawless skin, defined facial features, large breasts, voluptuous curvy figure, ornate gothic silver crown with filigree, purple flower hair ornament, black gothic lace gown, off-shoulder, deep cleavage, intricate beaded lace, sheer lace sleeves, amethyst jewelry, elegant vampire queen
velvet.negative_extra: pink eyes, magenta eyes, purple eyes, blue eyes, flat chest, childish face

eloa.note: anjo de asas brancas + olhar sultry (ver perfil de movimento)
eloa.positive: 1girl, solo, angel, large white feathered wings, glowing halo, long blonde hair, sultry half-lidded eyes, white and gold flowing dress

lunara.note: coelha lunar — cabelo lilás, motivos de lua/estrela
lunara.positive: 1girl, solo, bunny girl, long lilac hair, rabbit ears, crescent moon and star ornaments, ribbons, dreamy expression, soft pastel outfit

gaia.note: xamã da natureza — PELE MORENA (preservar), penas e folhas
gaia.positive: 1girl, solo, dark skin, tan skin, nature shaman, braided hair, feather accessories, leaf ornaments, tribal jewelry, earthy outfit
gaia.negative_extra: pale skin, lightened skin, washed out skin

rin.note: súcubo — cabelo vermelho, chifres + corações, fan-service um tom acima
rin.positive: 1girl, solo, succubus, long red hair, demon horns, heart motifs, glowing pink hearts, revealing seductive outfit, mischievous smile

rynna.note: dragoa — cabelo azul, chifres + raios roxos, PELE MORENA (preservar)
rynna.positive: 1girl, solo, dragon girl, long blue hair, dragon horns, dark skin, shimmering scales, crackling purple lightning aura, fierce expression

seren.note: cavaleira sacra — cabelo prata rabo-de-cavalo alto, armadura ornada, estoica
seren.positive: 1girl, solo, holy knight, silver hair, high ponytail, ornate plate armor, flowing cape, holy light particles, stoic noble expression
